summary: Frontend-only regression testing for 4 UI changes: (1) bottom tab bar limited to 3 tabs, (2) simplified 'Yeni Şirket' form (3 fields), (3) global font/height reductions on Field/Picker/Button, (4) reorganized card bottom row with dividers + adjustsFontSizeToFit. All 6 test cases (T1–T6) PASS on 390x844 mobile viewport.

test_details.T1_bottom_tabs: PASS — Bottom bar shows exactly 3 tabs (Özet, Kartlar, Bankalar). Cariler/Kasa/Kupür are hidden via href:null. Verified via tab labels: ['Özet','Kartlar','Bankalar']. Note: tabBarTestID does not emit data-testid on Expo web (a minor Expo web quirk, tabs still functional).
test_details.T2_quick_tabs: PASS — Home shows 3 pill cards (quick-tab-cariler, quick-tab-kasa, quick-tab-kupur) each with people/wallet/cash icon and correct colors (red/green/yellow). Tapping Cariler navigates to /cariler successfully.
test_details.T3_add_company_form: PASS — Sheet has ONLY 3 fields: input-company-name, input-company-branch, input-company-balance. input-company-phone and input-company-note are absent. btn-save-company works and creates company.
test_details.T4_action_sheet_sizes: PASS — All 3 chips (Yeni Alış/Elden Ödeme/Kart ile Ödeme) fit in a single row at 390px viewport (chips end at x≈313, viewport=390). Chip fontSize=12px (was 14). Amount input height=42px (was 48). Alış Ekle button height=46px (was 52).
test_details.T5_card_bottom_row: PASS — Bottom row has 5 children (3 columns + 2 dividers of width=1px). Columns are equally sized (~104.6px each) and centered. HARCANAN shows 4.523,75 ₺ (red), LİMİT shows 15.000,00 ₺, HESAP KESİM shows 15/07 · 7g. Horizontal divider on top (borderTopWidth=1). Numbers do not overlap.
test_details.T6_large_numbers: PASS — Card with limit=999999999 & used=888888888 renders '888.888.888,00 ₺' (w=92.75) and '999.999.999,00 ₺' (w=92.75) inside column widths of ~104.6px. No overflow, no overlap. Text renders at 12px (no shrink needed since it fits). adjustsFontSizeToFit + minimumFontScale=0.55 present as safety net.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In _layout.tsx, tabBarTestID is set but not rendered as data-testid on Expo web. Not blocking; tabs are still tappable via label. Consider adding a wrapper testID at the tab container level if strict data-testid access is needed for future E2E.
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral test data via UI (TESTCO company, Bonus card, BigCard card) — persisted to AsyncStorage/localStorage only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI changes verified. Bottom tab bar via href:null works. Add-company form has exactly 3 fields. Field/Picker/Button size reductions confirmed via computed styles. Card bottom row has vertical dividers (1px), 3 centered columns, and handles large numbers cleanly.
